pr.title: Add record: INT6 10L SWA NorMuon, val_bpb=1.2320

output.summary: 10-layer GPT blends INT6 quantization, SWA snapshot averaging, and NorMuon optimizer with aggressive warmdown to hit 16MB while boosting pre-quant quality.
techniques: INT6 per-row quantization with amax scaling for 3.82x compression
SWA averaging of 50 warmdown snapshots before quantization
NorMuon optimizer plus Muon weight decay under a long cosine warmdown
